query: Hotham Nordic Marathon cross country ski race Mount Hotham

videos.title: Winter X Games 2012: Women's Skier X Final
videos.description: Marte Gjefsen battles past two injured arms to take Skier X Gold.
videos.transcript:

videos.title: PAXC Ski Race 2011
videos.description:
A video of the 2011 PAXC Skate Ski Race by Radiate Video Productions.  The event saw 72 competitors, lots of spectators, and fun all around.  For more information about the Pembroke Area XC Ski Club, trail conditions and upcoming events visit paxc.blogspot.com.  

If you have an Adventure Tourism event or Company that you would like to promote with a video visit www.radiatevp.com to find out how we can help.

videos.title: Waddell flies to ninth in Slopestyle
videos.description: Cameron Waddell soared into the Lillehammer sky and did his country proud at the Winter Youth Olympic Games.
videos.transcript:
yes that's all right I tried landing

competitions can always be stressful but
if you're enjoying yourself then that's
all that matters I'm going back to
California got a couple more
competitions and good times I hope

videos.title: Kangaroo Hoppet 2019
videos.description: The Kangaroo Hoppet was held in fantastic weather on the Bogong High Plains just outside Falls Creek resort.

videos.title: Norway’s Hedegart Claims Victory at 56th Engadin Skimarathon | APT
videos.description:
Einar Hedegart won the men’s race at the Engadin Skimarathon after a tight sprint finish in Switzerland. Hedegart edged Jason Ruesch and Sabin Coupat to claim victory. In the women’s race, 18-year-old Anna Endress beat Swiss favourite Giuliana Werro in a dramatic finish, with Clemence Didierlaurent taking third place. Thousands of skiers competed in the popular 42-km race through the scenic Engadin valley.
#EngadinSkimarathon #CrossCountrySkiing #WinterSports #SportsNews #skirace 

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpLEtz3H0jSfEneSdf1YKnw/join
